data.content: Plan review approved. Three-knot decomposition is clean: b2b7 for timestamp-aware API filtering (Last 24h), 2288 for view refactor (remove tally, add combined chart, improved selectors, per-step leaderboard with margin), dafe for regression coverage. Key design decisions validated: margin as pp delta with dash for single-agent steps, preset state separate from manual dates, queue-type agnostic helpers. No invariants, security, or feasibility concerns.
